characters.physical_details: Junior player; recurrent right medial tibia pain after stress fracture.
characters.occupation_status: Middle-school student; junior squash athlete under supervised RTP.

state_transitions.change: Keeps Maya's watch and notebook; starts private log.
Right distal tibial stress fracture; six-week no-impact, boot/crutches.
Starts 9 p.m. compliance reports in phased PT/counseling.
Refuses hidden rest-day sparring; stays at Priya's apartment.
Signs mediated terms: 8h court/week, 3h strength/week, pain>=4 => 48h pause.
Calls medical timeout and retires; sponsor offer removed this cycle; no-impact pending MRI.
Assists clinics; reports overrun; accepts supervision.

characters.availability: Present throughout; away from home between chapter_13 and chapter_14.

characters.occupation_status: Bus-depot dispatch worker; overtime and app-driving.

state_transitions.change: Compliance warning limits unilateral control.
Breaks rest-day terms by booking hidden sparring.
Signs mediated co-governance terms.
Adds group-thread preapproval for schedule/sponsor changes.
Publicly supports medical retirement despite sponsor loss.

characters.physical_details: Deceased before chapter_01; present by letters, recordings, and memory.
characters.occupation_status: Former hospital lab technician; deceased six months pre-story.

state_transitions.change: Locker 214 letters/recordings become active decision inputs.
Friendship reset with explicit boundaries.

characters.literacy_languages: English fluent; Tamil fluent spoken, functional reading.

state_transitions.change: Provides temporary housing and custody ground rules.
Leads mediation; adds 72-hour fallback housing clause.
Defeats Anika 3-2 in regional quarterfinal.
Advances after Anika's semifinal medical retirement.
Imposes phased protocol, nightly reports, counseling check-ins; breaches risk suspension.
Requires written household terms and visible rest-day structure.

characters.occupation_status: Coach at Queens rec and tournaments.

state_transitions.change: Blocks unsafe full-load training before imaging.
Enforces 45-minute cap and logs incomplete drill.
Removes Anika's solo timer after overrun.

timeline.story_start: Late winter 2026 in Jackson Heights, about six months after Maya Iyer's death.
timeline.estimated_span: About nine months, ending in autumn 2026 with November billing pressure.

key_events.event: Hardship intake exposes debt totals and collections risk.
Right distal tibial stress fracture; six-week no-impact order.
Compliance notice sets 9 p.m. reports and suspension triggers.
Locker 214 cleared; letters and recordings recovered.
Mediated agreement defines enforceable load/conflict rules.
Semifinal medical retirement removes current-cycle sponsor offer.
Post-semifinal imaging unresolved; MRI authorization pending.

geography.primary_setting: Jackson Heights, Queens, with recurring Midtown travel and temporary Astoria refuge.

key_locations.name: Iyer Apartment
key_locations.details: Primary home; fridge calendar and kitchen table are governance points.

key_locations.name: Queens Public Rec Courts
key_locations.details: Core training/clinic site; persistent HVAC rattle.

key_locations.name: Hospital Records Locker 214
key_locations.details: Source of Maya's letters, recordings, and practical files.

key_locations.name: Priya's Astoria Apartment
key_locations.details: Temporary safety housing and mediation site.

key_locations.name: Queens Ortho
key_locations.details: Post-semifinal follow-up site with MRI authorization delay.

distances: Iyer Apartment to Queens rec is a short bus trip.
Iyer Apartment to Keating clinic is about three subway stops.
Iyer Apartment to Midtown club is usually 45-60 minutes by subway.
Jackson Heights to Priya's Astoria apartment is short by rideshare, longer by transit.

world_rules: Contemporary realistic fiction; no speculative elements.
Junior eligibility depends on compliance; unsanctioned impact work, missed reports, or skipped check-ins can trigger provisional suspension.
Medical no-impact orders are binding; physicians advise/document retirement, while athlete-guardian confirmation records it unless acute incapacity forces immediate stop.
Minors cannot independently execute contracts; guardian signatures control obligations.

power_structure.mechanism: orders, reporting rules, suspension flags, medical documentation.
temporary housing leverage, mediated terms, witness role.
offer issuance, cycle withdrawal, discretionary later review.

objects.status: Active ledger for pain, sleep, load, and debt notes.

objects.name: Right tibial no-impact order
objects.origin: Issued by Dr. Sonal Mehta after chapter_08 imaging.
objects.status: Core constraint; reaffirmed post-chapter_17 pending MRI.

objects.status: Active guidance source; one key letter kept by Anika.

objects.status: Active caps, pain-trigger pause, counseling cadence, conflict rules.

objects.status: Withdrawn for current cycle after chapter_17; November review is discretionary.

debts.status: Active plan; external-collections risk if payment is missed.

debts.amount: $1,860.12 original; $1,240.12 remaining after Aug 28 payment of $620.00
debts.status: Past due and unresolved in chapter_18.

debts.amount: $940 immediate-pay option to bypass covered MRI wait

income_sources.source: Program stipends, transit reimbursements, and fee waivers

knowledge_state.knows: Exact oncology/utility debt exposure and collections risk.
She underreported pain and edited logs pre-fracture.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: ravi_iyer and medical staff until chapters_08-10

knowledge_state.knows: Breach patterns can trigger provisional suspension.
Maya's instruction: choose a life wider than winning.
Rest-day breach details and custody-threat escalation.
Exact mediated clauses (caps, pain trigger, 72h fallback, group-thread governance).
Current-cycle sponsor offer is withdrawn; November review is discretionary.

environmental_constants: Queens rec courts carry persistent rubber-ball echo and metallic HVAC rattle.
The apartment kitchen repeatedly carries mustard-seed, curry-leaf, tea, and damp-transit smells.
Humid/damp weather repeatedly aggravates Anika's right-shin symptoms.
Bus/subway timing constraints materially shape training and school logistics.
